entry.title: BW extractor 2LIS_02_SCL showing different results for REEWR and DMBTR
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I'm trying to report on purchase price evolution, based on the 2LIS_02_SCL BW extractor. For some particular cases, this extractor is showing wrong invoice prices.

BWGEO is filled in using one of these formulas: 

  1. Invoice Qty * Invoice Value / Total Invoice Quantity
  2. EKET-MENGE * EKBE_DMBTR / EKBE-MENGE

The result for both of these formulas is different for one particular case though, because Invoice Value (REEWR) and Amount in Local Currency (DMBTR) contains different values as you can see here: 

Situation is that the GR was done on the PO, then IR at wrong price, then reversal of the IR + new IR with the correct price. BWGEO in the extractor is showing a price of 101.23, which is totally incorrect.

Anybody knows where

  1. the value in REEWR is coming from or
  2. how we can assure that this calculation is based on the DMBTR value?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Eclipse local history is empty
entry.content:
A local version should be implicitly created when you save changes in the editor.

Your preferences are okay.
Do you use the newest ADT client? If yes and the problem persists, you may create an incident and send us the complete support information (Help -> Collect Support Information).

entry.title: V_001P_I extraction
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Please advise how I can extract content of V_001P_I for all the countries in one shot?

Final goal is to have a list of all "PSG Tm Quota types" associated with Personnel area. Table V_001P_I displays only one country. In my case I have around 100 countries. Perhaps there is some workaround I'm not aware of. 

Many thanks in advance,
Albert

nächste heiße Option ist derzeit 4.7.2024. Das Org-Team arbeitet dran. Evtl. summer feeling, Donauinsel oder so. mal sehen.

entry.title: How to get the certificate data from absl logic
entry.content:

Is there any way that I can get the raw data of the certificate? 

Or if there is any other way, could you please provide?

entry.title: Re: VIM Workflow error NPO - Cannot initialize the Approv...
entry.content:
Hi 

If next user is not available or not mapped you will receive this error, please map the next level approver or get the user activated.

entry.title: Will the services created in the Gateway Service Builder conflict with the service bindings created
entry.content:
we are going to optimize pagination for cds view odata. seems that current default behavior is fetching all records regardless how small parameters DynamicPageSize, and DynamicPageNum are.

now, plan to create an exposures via SADL in SEGW to refine the class to adapt $top and $skip.

however, service binding is already created ADT.

hope I made myself clear.

4027 : Set Ticket selection in EAM Launchpad

https://me.sap.com/notes/3061274

entry.title: Users have added good receipt without PO in inventory transaction. Create Goods receipt report
entry.content: Users have added inventory in system using goods receipt function in Inventory Transaction and Not Goods receipt PO. Now I want to reconcile the inventory added in the system. Please help with the query to get goods receipt added in the system.

entry.title: Re: Updating Fixed Assets with a Distribution rule
entry.content:
Hi,

Distribution Rule for Fixed Assets can be updates using DTW, Update Master Data, Inventory->Item Master Data, using only ItemDistributionRule file with following header:

 

ParentKeyLineNumValidFromValidToDistributionRule
ParentKeyLineNumValidFromValidToDistributionRule
MF0097020230101 1920 
MF0098020230101 1920

entry.title: Re: Requirement Import in Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager
entry.content: Is there a way to mass import Work Package and Work item as well.?

entry.title: Is there a way to influence when a PMR Status is "finished"?
entry.content:
Hello,

the PMR in our system is very early finished. after the 1st pick. and not when the product has reached the psa. is this somehow configurable?

 

 

br

entry.title: Re: SAC for office excel stuck on login screen
entry.content:
Hello @eodiase1 

I would also recommend trying to clear the cache...

See this help page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_OFFICE/2b73edbc8f8f4189a36bc7a2e038185c/db2f874261824d63adb3ca198f65ce55.html?locale=en-US 

Clear the add-in cache.

This step is not needed if it's the first time you deploy the add-in in your organization. The sign-in to your tenants should work now.

However, the add-in cache must currently be cleared by every single user that has loaded the add-in before the tenant URLs have been configured.

Follow the steps depending on the used client/platform:

  • Excel Online

    Depending on the browser it may look a bit different. For the following example, Chrome was used. In general, you must clean the local storage of the Excel Online app.

    1. Open the Excel Online app in your browser and open some workbook.
    2. Open the F12 developer tools.
    3. Open tab Application.
    4. Expand the Local Storage node.
    5. Right click on the entry https://***-excel.officeapps.live.com (for example: https://euc-excel.officeapps.live.com) and choose Clear.
    6. Refresh the Excel Online app in the browser.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Private IP for Private Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

One of our Customer moving to Rise with SAP Private Cloud from Ecc 7.0 and sharing the Private IP as 192.168.196.0/24 network, for C4C as a hyperscaler.

The IP range i have checked in the IP Calculator it shows the private network only.

Request you to please help me is this pool comes in Private or Public network.

Thanks,
Balasubramanyam.

entry.title: smartforms打印不出䓬这个汉字
Re: Users have added good receipt without PO in inventory...
entry.content:
Hello @TanviV 

Goods receipts from vendors, without purchase orders are posted with 501 movement type in SAP standard set up. You can list all such material documents in MB51.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to sort based on user input values
entry.content:
Hello All,

How to sort the data based on the user input values in the selection screen

for example below is the data in the database table TABLE T1

Column 1Column 2Column 3
1Bz
2By
3Cy
4Az
5Dx
6Cx
7Ay
8By
9Dz
10Az

user input for sorting the data

Column2Column3
By
Az
Dx
C 

Expected output.

Column1Column2Column3
2By
8By
1Bz
7Ay
4Az
10Az
9Dz
5Dx
3Cy
6Cx

How this can be achieved in SQL ?

How sorting can be achieved if the data is available in the internal table ?

 

Regards,

Shashikiran.

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM - Enabling "ABAP Application log" Notificati...
entry.content:
It is currently not possible for SAP Cloud ALM Integration & Exception Monitoring to generate alerts/e-mails/chat notifications/tickets for Integration & Exception Monitoring metrics with "success" status. It is only possible to generate alerts/e-mails/etc. for metrics with failure statuses.

The Integration & Exception Monitoring Monitoring tab allows you to configure the data collection for specific categories/metrics related to a system or service. Those configurations give you the option input filters so your SAP Cloud ALM tenant will only collect very specific data from your monitored system.
You can for example collect only errors, or collect only "positive" data (successful messages, etc.), and so on.

But the categories/metrics data collection configuration and filters are separate and different from the event configurations. Collecting only "success" messages in your categories/metrics data collection configuration does not give the ability to send e-mails about that data.

Integration & Exception Monitoring currently only offers the option to trigger events in response scenarios when there are errors or issues. The word "Erroneous" is included at the start of the event names to indicate that they are for issues. No events are currently available for responding to "successful" metrics.

entry.title: How can I prepare myself for the SAP Certified Associate - Enterprise Architecture Consultant?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Learning to Use the LeanIX Tool for Successful Enterprise Architecture learning journey

 

Overview
This Learning Journey is designed to help you prepare for the SAP Certified Associate - Enterprise Architecture Consultant – LeanIX Certificate. It provides LeanIX admins with a deep understanding of LeanIX features, its set up and introduces to two practical use cases.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to:

  • Get started with LeanIX, understand the general modeling guidelines of different fact sheet types, and import data into LeanIX,
  • Apply the Application Portfolio Assessment & the Application Rationalization use cases with LeanIX,
  • Configure the LeanIX meta model configuration, and define the adoption and advanced collaboration settings,
  • Understand and use the LeanIX diagrams,
  • Explain different LeanIX out-of-the-box integrations

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: How to define dependencies between customer exit variables?
entry.content:

Edit: One more additional note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3144996/ 

Maybe you can test this RSADMIN parameter, too?!

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Confirmed Alerts: How to acces?
entry.content:
It is currently not possible to access confirmed alerts. 
Once they are confirmed, there is no view or other access possible.

Your post had some ideas for how to improve or update the functionality. 
Please log those ideas as requests (or vote on existing, similar requests) in the relevant SAP Customer Influence Program for SAP Cloud ALM (in this case, the SAP Cloud ALM for Operations influence program).
This will help our Developers to identify areas of improvement.

in the Logistics integration customizing for item category SRVV you also need to maintain a sub-scenario "01-Advance Shipment (via Sales Order)"

Regards, Gert

are there any news about support for "SAP Event Mesh" to be monitored in SAP Cloud ALM.
Best regards
Ralf

entry.title: End-To-End performance optimization in SAP Analytics Cloud with SAP Enterprise Support Services
entry.content:
Recently I posted a blog about SAP Analytics Cloud: Continuous Quality Checks (CQC services).
The overall performance of SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) is mainly determined by the three components:

  • Client time - frontend
  • Network time
  • SAP Analytics Cloud service time - backend 

 It is important to regularly monitor and analyze the performance of SAP Analytics Cloud to identify and address any bottlenecks or inefficiencies.
The CQC services in my blog above offer great value in assisting you to analyze your system and/or situation based on real life data from your SAP Analytics Cloud Stories or Analytic Applications etc.
They do primarily focus on the frontend and network aspects. 

In many cases the frontend can be the smaller portion of the total build time of a Story in SAP Analytics Cloud. When connecting to live SAP data sources you must ensure that these have been optimized for reporting usage. This can be achieved by optimizing database queries, tuning configurations and parameters, and scaling resources to handle increasing user loads. Additionally, implementing caching mechanisms, utilizing efficient data storage and retrieval techniques etc.

Getting to the Root Cause

To begin with you should perform some root cause analysis to narrow down where time is being spent.
Take a look at these useful resources and tooling within SAC  

  • 2511489 - Troubleshooting performance issues in SAP Analytics Cloud 
  • SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Decision Tree
  • SAP Analytics Cloud – Administration Cockpit
  • SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Statistics and Analysis
  • SAP Analytics Cloud Data Action Performance Statistics and Analysis
  • SAP Analytics Cloud - Performance Measurement

Once you establish the total build time and how much time is spent in the three components, you can follow the guidance in the links above to work on improving and optimizing each part.  

SAP Enterprise Support Services - Backend 

If you encounter a situation where you have performance impact coming from an SAP source system, such as SAP BW or SAP HANA, one option available to you is to engage with us and consume your entitlements from SAP Enterprise Support. We deliver specific recommendations via our CQC checks to help you fine tune these data sources.
Especially relevant for SAP BW and SAP HANA DB are: 

Technical Performance Optimization (TPO)

The TPO service is designed to be an overall health check focusing on throughput of your database.
Some of the checks included in the service include:

  • Checks for major misconfigurations and hardware bottlenecks
  • Parameter settings, table space, expensive SQL statements
  • Database management (CBO statistics, Index and table storage management, Online log configuration)

For more details read the infosheet.

Business Process Performance Optimization (BPPO)

The CQC for SAP Business Process Performance Optimization is designed to ensure best performance for business-critical steps in your solution. It is more relevant for specific issues like modeling. 
Some of the checks included in the service include:

  • Detailed technical analysis of critical process steps, evaluates and identifies potential improvement areas.
  • Investigation of long running process chains / failed process chains.
  • Investigation of long running BW queries
  • Parameter checks of the system for both hardware/software and suggestions for performance improvement

For more details read the infosheet


Further Support and Empowerment via SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Value Maps are a support and empowerment program from SAP Enterprise Support and are available to you via the SAP Learning Hub. A one-time sign in with your S User is required, and everything thereafter is free as part of your entitlements. We provide:

  • Prescriptive Guidance
  • Empowerment
  • Social Collaboration
  • Expert Access

For Data and Analytics we provide all of the services and support outlined above, and much more, as part of our Learning Journeys. This includes SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Datasphere, and SAP BW topics.  
We have dedicated Learning Journeys for SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Datasphere, and SAP BW topics.

Check out the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page for more and start engaging today!

 

Quicklinks

  • SAP Analytics Cloud: Continuous Quality Checks
  • Safeguard your SAP BW conversion with SAP Enterprise Support services
  • Practical Guide: How to build SAP Analytics Cloud stories using SAP Datasphere
  • E-Learning series: SAP Datasphere Connectivity
  • Plan your Conversion to SAP Datasphere with BW Bridge, or SAP BW/4HANA
  • SAP Analytics Cloud - Expert Guided Implementation
  • Learning Journey - SAP Extended Planning and Analysis (xP&A)
  • SAP Analytics Cloud - Deployment Readiness

entry.title: Re: Prevent an inventory transfer from expired batch in s...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you are entering the expiry date in batch management window then this can be achieved. Try below query in transaction notification

 

SELECT T1."BaseNum", T1."BaseType", T1."DocDate", T0."ItemCode", T1."ItemName", T0."DistNumber", T0."ExpDate" FROM OBTN T0 , IBT1 T1 WHERE T0."ExpDate" < Current_Date And T1."BaseType" = 67 And T1."BaseEntry" = :list_of_cols_val_tab_del;

Hope this helps

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model not found in...
entry.content:
Hi there,

your assumption is correct, the "Cloud Foundry Environment" pipeline is the one for you. We have recently updated and renamed the pipelines -- we'll update the tutorial as soon as possible.

Thanks for reaching out!
Christoph

entry.title: Re: Capturing Issues/Risks/Decisions within CALM
entry.content:
Currently SAP Cloud ALM does not include specific features for risk management and decision tracking. 

You may be able to leverage the existing Task Management functionality to establish the decision making required for identified risks, and document them there as a workaround. 
However this will not have any rich risk management functionality associated with it, and may complicate the overall process. 

Risk management/decision tracking could be proposed as a feature request/improvement in the SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation SAP Customer Influence program. Please check if this request already exists in that platform and vote on it if a request exists. If one does not exist, please feel free to create the request to highlight to our Developers that you have interest in this feature.

entry.title: #COE#RFL01-Mass Retirement / Mass Transfer of fixed assets in S/4Hana Cloud public
entry.content:
Dear All, 
As part of a project, we would like to make a mass retirement of fixed asset from one company to two other different companies in the same country. We have around 14,000 fixed assets.
The only way we've found is a depreciated app called "Post Retirement (Non-Integrated) - Without Customer", which allows you to enter assets, 8 assets by 8 assets which is very time-consuming when you have more than 14,000 assets.

Would you have a solution for mass asset retirement or transfer in the S/4hana public cloud, please?

Thank you a lot for your help. 

Best regards, 

Mouna

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud SCIM API version 1 and 2 high-level comparison
entry.content:
Hello again @Matthew_Shaw ,

one more question regarding just proposed solution 3092730 - How to modify a user or group using the SAC API's when you don't know the associate roles in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) - SAP for Me . Do I understand correctly, that when we make the parameter change (x-ignore-roles-if-missing = TRUE) in IPS even if the PUT command from idp returns the empty roles, those will be ignored on SAC and as a result the ream will not get unassigned from the role in SAC? so:

Action in IDPRoles on teamExisting SAC Roles of the teamSet "x-ignore-roles-if-missing" HeaderExpected SAC team Roles
Update Group with no roles "roles": [PROFILE:sap.epm:SAC_Viewer"]TRUE"roles": ["PROFILE:sap.epm:SAC Viewer"]

I am looking forward to hear from you 😉

entry.title: Re: "Order related Billing status" / Over All Billing Status to be Change.
entry.content: it worked for me when I changed the order related billing type in sales order type from IV to L2.

entry.title: Re: Health Monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Nilabh,

Just so you know, you haven't posted this as a blog, you've posted this to the Q&A section.
This probably has affected the traffic, because people might expect it to be a question instead of blog content. 

In the future, I suggest that you double check that you are posting the to "Blog" area before submitting the post.
It will improve the engagement with your post and increase the likelihood of it being seen.

Thanks and regards, 
John

entry.title: CVI synchronisation - customer converted to BP but contact person not.
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in a CVI synchronisation project in preparation for the transformation from ECC to S/4HANA. We were able to convert the customers and vendors to business partners. The contact persons of the vendors could be created correctly. However, it does not create the contact persons for the customers. When we run the CVI Load Tool, the message appears that the business partner for the customer has already been created and the programme does not continue. Is there a separate programme that can be used to create contact persons or does anyone have any ideas on how we can solve the problem?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPC MS 10.1 package suddenly fails with HRESULT: 0xC020801C
entry.content: Hi Mike. On wich version are facing this problem ? For DBServer as well as AppServer... Many thanks. Monica.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM and ServiceNow Integration - has it wor...
entry.content:
Hi Tripti,

I can't speak to the middleware topic (APIgee, etc.), but I can speak about the mapping topic.

It doesn't matter if you use one of the "built-in" mapping examples as a start point/template, or if you create a mapping from scratch.
The mapping you use must always follow the formats and conventions that SAP Cloud ALM supports, outlined in the below guides:

  • Rule-based mapping
  • Payload based mapping

A mapping in the External API Management app typically includes "placeholder" attributes in its JSON.
When an event is created in SAP Cloud ALM, it includes a "payload" from the usecase that triggered the event.
That "payload" contains the useful data like the affected system/service, metric name, etc.
The SAP Cloud ALM event triggers processing of the mapping "placeholder" attributes, and replaces them with real values from the "payload". 
The transformed data is then sent to the external API via our background jobs and processes. 

The child pages of the Management of External APIs guide have more information about the different payloads that SAP Cloud ALM provides for use in mappings.

Because of this workflow and process, the mapping file you maintain for any external software (be that ServiceNow, or another ticketing program) must always follow the guidelines in the links I shared above.

Generally speaking (e.g. if middleware like APIgee is not a factor), the "built-in" mappings for ServiceNow work "out-of-the-box" without changes.
They will provide a barebones ticket creation experience, but will function fine.

entry.title: Unsupported engine Node version error in Business Application Studio SAP BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi All,

Getting below error when I build node js app based on tutorial.

Tutorial link https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-cap-service.html 

.npm WARN EBADENGINE Unsupported engine {
npm WARN EBADENGINE package: '@sap/xsenv@3.4.0',
npm WARN EBADENGINE required: { node: '^10.0.0 || ^12.0.0 || ^14.0.0 || ^16.0.0 || ^18.0.0' },
npm WARN EBADENGINE current: { node: 'v20.12.0', npm: '10.5.0' }
npm WARN EBADENGINE }

Not able to downgrade node version.

entry.title: Re: Get Limited Screen While Scanning Bar Code
entry.content: Thanks Bill, we are able to achieve material using data query builder. Same time we need to scan bar code and get the material which is having the scanned serial number. But in the list data entity is MaterialSLoc, and there's navigation property for Materials entity, and another navigation from materials to MyEquipSerialNum for serial number. Can we achieve this also without adding custom property in Materials entity ?

entry.title: Re: Couldnt able to read SAP DI destination URL from SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP)
entry.content: @sainithesh21 Can you also show the package.json file?

entry.title: Re: Central Procurement Approval Workflow based on Accoun...
entry.content:
Hi, 

do you mean using account assignment type as precondition in an approval step? It's there if you use the approval workflow on item level.

If you mean the value of the cost type, then you have to use the BAdIs:

  • Providing additional conditions for scenarios (SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF)
  • Value evaluation of additional conditions for scenarios (SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL)

to create own preconditions.

Best regards

Georgios

entry.title: Re: How to enable custom field on Create Supplier Invoice...
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please mention the business context you used to enable the custom field in "create supplier invoice app" as well as the steps you followed to add that field there ?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: SAP 10 B1: Web Client Extensions Install Error
entry.content:
Hi ,

This issue is occurred due to missing provider name. Please add provide name in mta.yaml file and then  build the solution. Please refer below screen shot.

Also refere below link for your reference

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_WEB_CLIENT/e6ac71d18c7543828bd4463f77d67ff7/3ddc9102b0fc4adeb90c8c7d0fd4a410.html?version=10.0%20FP%202105

entry.title: Re: How to get started with SAP Warehouse Operator App V2.3
entry.content:
Hey Sandeep,

I noticed that the app needs 7 destinations to be created. Unfortunately, the Free Tier plan of Mobile Services on BTP only allows for 6 destinations to be created. This disqualifies the possibility of running this service for free during evaluation, training or test purposes. Is there anything you could suggest to get this app to work in the BTP Free Tier?

Thanks!
Jan

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 3
entry.content:
@thomas_mller13  All very good questions!

1. Here you can get some more info on the dataset, I would assume US dollars

2. Quick google search on PLU: "A PLU code, or price look up code, is a 4 or 5 digit code that is unique to a particular produce item; based upon the commodity, the variety and the size group; and will typically appear on a small sticker that is applied to the individual piece of fresh produce."

3. In week 4 you will see that we actually will get feature importance scores from the model and we will see that we do not need all the features from the dataset.

4. Good catch! That is one of the benefits of using the DAR service, you do not need to encode categorical text values yourself. DAR does that automatically for you.

entry.title: Re: Adding namespace to the output payload in CPI Mapping...
entry.content: You have to flatten the schema or map using XSL/Groovy as suggested in Multiple Target Namespaces in Graphical Mapping

entry.title: Re: Users have added good receipt without PO in inventory...
entry.content:
Hello @TanviV 

You've put your question in the ERP Q&A area. Hence my answer is relevant to ECC and S/4HANA. B1 is a completely different product, in which I don't specialize.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Can traditional datasource works simultaneously with ODP datasource
entry.content:
Hello guys,

A list of BI-content datasource, e.g. 2lis_02*， 2lis_03*,... is productive.

If I use program to expose one of the datasource to ODP datasource, for example 2lis_02_itm.

What will happen?

Will I have two 2lis_02_itm in RSA7 and ODQMON?

If 2lis_02_itm in rsa7 will dispear(I think so), because other 2lis02 datasources are still using delta queue,

Is V3 job so clever to send 2lis_02_itm data to ODQMON and other 2lis02 datasource data to RSA7?

The purpose is to find a good way to upgrade productive BI-Content datasource to ODP datasource.

If you have any good articles, documents, could you please reply to me?

Thanks!

entry.title: Implementations not showing in the IMG
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have 2 implementations for a BAdI, but the IMG does not display the list of implementations that are present for a BAdI in S4HANA(2023).

 

Any configuration needed for this?

Thanks
Vidya

entry.title: India Employee Central payroll Implementation
entry.content:
Hi All,

Would like to know if how is the setup maintained when we have Employee Central in scope while implementing ECP for India. Mainly from a flexi pay standpoint, would like to understand how is it considered for ECP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud: OIDC with external Identity Provider
entry.content:
Yes, this is possible. 

You will find information on the required settings in the storefront here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_COMPOSABLE_STOREFRONT/eaef8c61b6d9477daf75bff9ac1b7eb4/dc307a52881548e9a15aa6fcba6f7587.html?q=session%20management

 

As a good starting point for backend implementation, I recommend you check out the sapcxsinglesignon and sapcxenvconfig extensions here: https://github.com/sapcxtools/workspace/tree/develop/core-customize/hybris/bin/custom/sapcxtools

The general idea is to add an extra filter that runs before the Spring Security filter chain, checks for token validity and saves the token in the token store, so that the spring security filter chain will accept the user as authenticated.

entry.title: Is there a BADI for Bill of Material (BOM) in S/4HANA CLoud ?
entry.content:
Is there a BADI for Bill of Material (BOM)  in S/4HANA CLoud ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a BADI for Bill of Material (BOM) in S/4HANA...
entry.content:
The BADI BOM_BEFORE_SAVE is available 

Business Context : Master Data: Bill of Material Header, Master Data: Bill of Material Items

BADI ID : BOM Validation Before Saving

entry.title: SAP BO - e-invoicing implementation across EU member states
entry.content:
Dear SAPpers,

Following the introduction of e-invoicing in various European states, how is SAP moving to implement e-invoicing between member states? Is there anything in place already?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Re: How to achieve an Activity Hook in SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud (DMC)
entry.content:
Hello Aboli,

How I can get the input which is coming from trigger, as in SAP ME can log inputXML in event logger to get input coming from Hook point DTO in xml format. I am interested in finding out input parameters and values coming from Automatic Trigger business rule.

Thanks in advance!

BR,

Umar Syed

entry.title: Batch setting for BOM loss rate ?
entry.content:
A component material exists in multiple BOMs, and the amount used in each BOM is different. The scrap rate of the component in each BOM is not exactly the same.

Is there a batch method to change the scrap rate of the corresponding component in the BOM?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Batch setting for BOM loss rate ?
entry.content:
The API API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002 is available in S/4HANA CLoud to update BOM Components.

 

The Entity MaterialBOMItem of the API has the field COMPONENTSCRAPINPERCENT

 

Information on the API is available at the link https://api.sap.com/api/API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002/overview

entry.title: Re: Couldnt able to read SAP DI destination URL from SAP...
entry.content: @MioYasutake , Thanks for the quick response. Updated the package.json file in the question. please refer.

entry.title: Invoice scanning export is not showing Supplier name under the Supplier Column
entry.content:
How to export the Supplier Name along with Supplier ID under the Supplier column? 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Invoice scanning export is not showing Supplier name...
entry.content:
When the Completed Scanned Invoices are exported to excel, the Supplier column has only Supplier ID but not Supplier name. 

While in the UI, the Supplier column shows both Supplier ID and Supplier Name. 

 

There is no specific column dedicated to Supplier Name and there is no option to add it further as well. 

This is the expected system behavior .

 

Kindly refer to the KBA for further reference. 

3270623 - Supplier Name not visible in Invoice Scanning view

entry.title: How do I add a job in IBP planner workspace?
Re: Saving sorting preferences for list of objects
entry.content:
You can certainly save them using state variables and later retrieve them and set them again.
I am not sure what do you mean by saving them in preferences vs user defaults?

entry.title: Re: Implementations not showing in the IMG
entry.content: Did you create the test implementation directly from SE19 and not from SPRO (Sales and Distribution / Billing / Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) / Set Approval Request Reasons for Preliminary Billing Documents - S_ER9_52001714 - SD_BIL_DOC_APPROVAL)

entry.title: Re: Login failure to Access database when trying to print...
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I looked at the machine having the issue and it does have the 32-bit access driver installed.

entry.title: Re: Error reading CDC annotations: mapping field does not exist [Analytics] - TM tables
entry.content: Hi Loed, Did you found any solution I am facing the same error but CDS view is getting activated also able to view the data but error is still appearing.

entry.title: Re: Error reading CDC annotations: mapping field does not exist [Analytics] - CDS Views :
entry.content: Hi, Did you found any solution to the above error I am also facing the same error

entry.title: Re: How to refresh an application screen using SAP iRPA -...
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am using this question to get additional support and to gather additional information for people searching for this issue.
I want to use refresh screen in my automation for a similar reason. Automating a SAPWebGUI app in the browser.
However I cant select any of my screens for the activity.
I doesn't allow me to confirm my selection:

As framework for the application/screens I have selected SAPWebGUI.
Does this block the refresh screen activity? 😕

entry.title: Which t-code use to find Vendor by their PAN number?
Re: Expert Systems in AI: Bridging Human Expertise and Machine Intelligence
entry.content: Thanks Arun. Very well articulated "AI" simplified

entry.title: Re: How to define dependencies between customer exit vari...
entry.content:
Hi Martin, 

thanks for your answer - I checked the RSADMIN parameters, but with no success. The mentioned notes don't apply to our system (we are already on a higher version) or are describing other issues / errors. 

Regards, 

Marius

entry.title: Re: Unsupported engine Node version error in Business App...
entry.content: in the package.json, change version of @Sap/xsenv to newer one, 5.1.0

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Resources Posting Ex.Rate in Production Process
entry.content: @SAPSupport no support?

entry.title: ATP Check for STO outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

                            I have one query; we have created outbound delivery with respect to sales order and run the Availability check in VL02N (change mode) system is not consider the Outbound delivery quantity and propose the cumulative quantity. Whereas outbound delivery created with respect to stock transfer order, and we run the availability check in VL02N system is considered the Outbound delivery quality also as confirmed therefore cumulative quantity shows less quantities.

        SAP S/4HANA for advanced ATP 

Example:

Sales order generated outbound delivery.

                        Available stock 100 Kg

                        Outbound delivery 30 Kg

                        When we run the ATP in VL02N for this outbound delivery – Cumulative quantity shows as 100 Kg.

STO generated outbound delivery.

                         Available stock 100 Kg

                         Outbound delivery 30 Kg

                        When we run the ATP in VL02N for this outbound delivery – Cumulative quantity shows as 70 Kg.

 

My requirement is STO generated outbound delivery ATP run  also should propose 100 kg as cumulative quantity.

 

Thanks in advance,

Nagaraj

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Key Performance Metrics from SAP ASE...
entry.content: Hey, @Mark_A_Parsons, again thanks for your response, we are able to fetch the data related to lock, connection and memory, but in the case of heap meamory we need the heap memory utilization of the Sybase JVM. Is the heap memory shown by the sp_monitorconfig shows the heap memory of JVM or of sybase. In sybase document I did not get the any info related to heap memory of sybase JVM.

entry.title: Re: CD/CD with SAP Native HANA Application dev space
entry.content: how come the hana project is not built by cap? if it is not built by cap, your development are in the wrong direction

entry.content:
I trying to add new batch split using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE ( T-code VL02N)
Its urgent . Please help me on this 

Getting this error : Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: 000001 .


Here is my code :



Regards ,
Vasanth

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hello @simonpolovina1,

with one single subscription to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub, learners get access to all resources they need to prepare for certifications, take the certification exams, and access all the enablement and assessment they need to stay certified – at better value than ever before. A subscription offers access to expert guidance in live sessions, on-demand access to hands-on practice systems, enhanced analytics, learning management and four included certification exam attempts per learner per year to get and stay certified. Organizations and individuals can subscribe to the enhanced SAP Learning Hub edition here or, SAP Partner firms (SAP PartnerEdge members) can subscribe to the SAP Learning Hub, partner edition. Make sure your company subscribes to take full advantage of the upskilling and certification opportunities and maximize success.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: How to ignore specific transport from Downgrade Protection detection
entry.content:
As I read this, I was thinking, "Is this a good idea?" Then I read the cautions in the summary. Removing the DGP check should be done only after careful consideration of the circumstances and potential consequences.

Thanks for the post!

entry.title: Re: Which t-code use to find Vendor by their PAN number?
entry.content: You can check in J_1IMOVEND table.

entry.title: Accessing files in local network from Private Cloud ABAP
entry.content:
I have to put files in a directory in the local network (windows share) from S/4 Private Cloud ABAP program.

Is it possible to mount the directory at the private cloud server via VPN? Then i could easily use OPEN DATASET in ABAP.

Can I use the Cloud Connector to access the directory? An how would I address the Cloud Connector in ABAP?

Or has anybody a good alternative idea?

Thank you in advance for your ideas
Torsten

entry.title: Re: Which t-code use to find Vendor by their PAN number?
entry.content: You can check in J_1IMOVEND table.

entry.title: Re: Error in Flexible Workflow for PR
entry.content: Eric the task displayed in your reply is a background task,

entry.title: Re: Bex query setting "display rows as hierarchy" is show...
entry.content:
Hi h_strijkert,

did you find an answer to this problem? I suppose it's a missing feature right?


BR Tobias

entry.title: Re: Help with error: 401 - Unauthorised: Access is denied...
entry.content:
If nothing has changed in SAP Enable Now, this is almost guaranteed to be down to a change made by your network / access admin people. Either a change was put into the Identity Provider, or how SSO is authenticating has changed. Check with your BASIS people and ask them what changed.

Things to double-check in SAP Enable Now: Check the object-level permissions for the Learner role and make sure they are still OK. Check the workarea-level permissions for the Learner role and make sure they are still OK. In Server Settings, check SSO is still enabled.

entry.title: Statement coming in 2 pages
entry.content:
Hi,

The statement is coming 2 pages, however we need to fit the statement in single page, for that I have already used the smallest font available, but still its coming in 2 pages. Is there another alternative, can we remove the space between the two lines. Please confirm. Attaching the image for the reference.

entry.title: Re: Error in Flexible Workflow for PR
entry.content:
Hi Eric, 

The task you are showing is background task

 

We are only checking the dialog task 

So check the other task (activity tab), all the dialog task shall be checked

If your workflow is WS00800157 the only other task is TS00800547

Click on the icon (yellow one)

Check if it is a general task if not set it up as a general task by clicking on carateristique button

entry.title: Re: Use a specific a diagram for CDM report
entry.content: You can choose which model objects (including diagrams) appear in a report - take a look at Selecting Objects to Display in the Report | SAP Help Portal
